## CustomAnnotationRegistration interface

Registration for a custom annotation that may produce JSON Schema keywords.

Custom annotations are referenced by FormSpec's internal custom-annotation nodes. They describe or present a field but do not affect which values are valid.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface CustomAnnotationRegistration
```
